page.title: Category:8th century by country by year

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[:Category:7世紀の各国 (年別)|← 7世紀]] | [[:Category:9世紀の各国 (年別)|9世紀 →]] [[Category:各年の国|08]] Category:8...」

revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
